name: Cook Saga
short_description: Learn new skills, buy counter, upgrade your restaurant, and COOK, COOK until there is no more customer. Cook saga is a game about skill and financial decision making for still be here tomorrow.
detailed_description:
Cook saga is a cooperative restaurant management game.

Serve customers as quickly as possible, earn stars as you complete levels, unlock your trade and new skills to help your team succeed in increasingly intense levels.

Between each day, customize your restaurant to respond more effectively to the types of customer that arrive.

There are currently three unlockable professions:

The Chef: he unlocks raw materials to cook healthier and, above all, more economically.

The Waiter: has a whole range of skills to satisfy customers.

The Storekeeper: buys and manages the restaurant, with commercial skills.

Depending on the level, the game can be played by between 4 and 6 players.
